_안내: 이 파일만 고치면 사이트 전체(이름/소개/연락처/링크)가 바뀝니다. 따옴표 안의 내용만 바꾸세요.
name: TaeJun Park
tagline: Documenting my research and reviewing the papers I read on AI accelerators and computer architecture.
about: Hi, I'm TaeJun Park, a master's student in the IDEA Lab at Hongik University. I'm interested in AI accelerators and computer architecture. On this site I introduce my research and post reviews of papers I've read, written in my own words.

research.summary: I work on AI accelerators and computer architecture — designing and analyzing efficient hardware for machine-learning workloads.

_링크안내: 보이고 싶은 링크는 url을 채우고, 숨기고 싶은 링크는 url을 빈 문자열("")로 두세요.
